tweets.text:
im never going to prioritize airdrops over what i believe is best for token price, if you're only holding bc you think you're going to get an airdrop then you should sell now

I will distribute supply fairly, over time, to the people who contribute the most to the network and are long-term aligned, so you should not be concerned if you plan on holding for a long time and contributing value, if you just want coins now to market sell then you should buy something else

thread_tweets.text:
well the reason i had the team build https://t.co/bcooKtvatf is because i didnt want to airdrop supply to people who just dusted a lot of empty wallets, i would rather airdrop to real people who are also posting about the coin, building products around the coin, doing educational content, IRL content etc etc - so this allows me to track people's holding time + X impressions and other things, and you can import multiple wallets

am aware some people don't want to import their keys so we're working on something for that but current iteration works well as is

tweets.text: If you ask AI to objectively review all the publicly available information, including what's been published on https://t.co/BmV7zaxKAr  about Euro Pacific Bank—including the evidence from the successful defamation lawsuit against Nick McKenzie and 60 Minutes Australia, the now-unredacted emails obtained through FOIA between the IRS, ATO, and OCIF, and the fact that no criminal charges were ever filed against anyone associated with the bank, including its customers—and offer an opinion as to why the bank was shut down, it will conclude that the bank was shut down purely to allow the J5 to turn its failed Atlantis investigation into a fake success. All the evidence of widespread government corruption, obstruction of justice, and abuse of power is there. All one has to do is ask AI to review it.

@neverlucky888 @yeet What games do you mean?  

Yes, the RTP’s are verified by providers.  It’s impossible to realize true RTP in small sample sizes which is what everyone is playing.  So you will experience variance to the up and down side.
tweets.full_text:
@neverlucky888 @yeet What games do you mean?  

Yes, the RTP’s are verified by providers.  It’s impossible to realize true RTP in small sample sizes which is what everyone is playing.  So you will experience variance to the up and down side.
